title: Graph Neural Networks, Step by Step
tagline: Message passing on a sensor-network graph — every round, watch the signal spread
summary: A 14-node sensor graph in your browser. Pick a node, add a feature spike, and step through 1, 2, 3 rounds of message passing — watch the signal diffuse to neighbours and neighbours-of-neighbours. Toggle aggregation (mean / max / attention). Lab-aligned: cross-station air-quality models, satellite tile graphs.
highlights: Live message passing on a 14-node graph; click a node, spike its feature, watch K rounds of diffusion.
Aggregation toggle (mean GCN / max / attention GAT) with visibly different propagation patterns.
Node-classification toy with a logistic head trained on 4 labelled nodes.
Lab fit: cross-station AQ, satellite-tile graph, sensor-network monitoring.
